title: Steak Doneness
description: Adds rare, medium-rare, medium, medium-well, well-done steak doneness levels.
body: This mod adds different doneness levels (rare, medium-rare, medium, medium-well, well-done) for the food Steak and prevents you from having the vanilla Steak. You can increase the level by cooking it over and over again. The higher level means filling the hunger bars more.
